stemHtml: Jet engine total efficiency indicates the efficiency at which…

options.a: potential energy in the jet is transformed into propulsive energy.
options.b: the increase of jet kinetic energy is transformed into propulsive energy.
options.c: chemical power in the fuel is transformed into propulsive power (T x V).
options.d: chemical power in the fuel is transformed into an increase of jet kinetic energy per second.
